indications.text:
RHOPRESSA (netarsudil ophthalmic solution) 0.02% is indicated for the reduction of elevated intraocular
pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.

2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION
3 DOSAGE FORMS AND STRENGTHS 11 DESCRIPTION

RHOPRESSA (netarsudil ophthalmic solution) 0.02% is indicated for the reduction of elevated
intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension.
